Entity Profile
P

Marla Poulsen

Person · First seen 3304-08-10 · 4 mentions
Active: 3304-08-10 → 3304-08-19
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3304-08-19
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering Jarl Toredo's disclosure of a secret romance with Aisling Duval, Dr Ulyanov's arrest, new personal computer designs from Supratech and Herculean Machines, the rogue robot in Beta Hydri being located, Zachary Rackham's lottery win, and the successful conclusion of the Pleiades rescue operation.
3304-08-18
Pleiades Rescue Operation Concludes
Aegis Research announces the successful conclusion of its Pleiades rescue operation. Hundreds of pilots delivered stranded survivors and commodities to Donar's Oak. Superintendent Marla Poulsen reports a fantastic number of rescued survivors and sufficient food stocks to care for them before moving to dedicated refugee centres.
3304-08-12
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the disappearance of Riri McAllister's medical transport, Jarl Toredo's resignation from Unchain, further FIA arrests of Far God cultists, the malfunctioning mining robot in Beta Hydri, the Pleiades rescue operation, and the successful conclusion of Aranbarahun Purple Creative's cargo ship campaign.
3304-08-10
Pleiades Rescue Operation
After sustained Thargoid attacks on civilian targets in the Pleiades Nebula, Aegis Research coordinates a rescue operation to locate and recover survivors. Superintendent Marla Poulsen requests pilots recover occupied and damaged escape pods, and deliver food resources including fruit, vegetables, grain, and food cartridges to Donar's Oak in the Pleiades Sector IR-W d1-55 system.
